title: approve-inbox YonBIP API calls go through iuap-apcom-cli

stories.want: to synchronize inbox items through workflow task inbox-list
stories.soThat: YonBIP credentials, routing and gateway behavior stay centralized in iuap-apcom-cli
acceptance: sync-inbox does not call the YonBIP todo list endpoint directly
sync-inbox maps CLI todo rows into the existing ApproveInboxData structure
sync errors are surfaced as fetch_failed or no_proxy compatible errors

stories.want: to fetch document details, metadata and attachment references through workflow task document-get
stories.soThat: MDF, iForm and YNF data access share bip-cli HTTP routing
acceptance: fetch-bill-detail and framework clients no longer direct fetch YonBIP document APIs
existing field, attachment and richDetail shapes remain usable by normalize and agent analysis

stories.want: approve/reject/write actions to execute through dangerous workflow task commands
stories.soThat: business state changes use the official command safety model
acceptance: MDF batch approve/reject calls bip-cli commands with --yes
iForm approve/reject and patch approve call dedicated bip-cli commands with --yes
failed CLI calls do not move items to done

stories.want: system rule audit summaries to load through workflow task intelligentresult-get
stories.soThat: new intelligent audit API is registered as a formal workflow task command
acceptance: cloud-audit-result does not direct POST to cloudAudit endpoints
success, not_found, disabled and model_error statuses retain the existing normalize contract
